items.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
items.summary: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.
items.titleZh: SpaceX与开源AI初创公司Reflection签署了价值高达63亿美元的计算能力协议
items.summaryZh: SpaceX已将其Colossus数据中心转变为商业计算能力平台，最近与Anthropic、谷歌和Cursor达成了协议。

items.title: OpenAI’s suspiciously clean balance sheet is about to get a hard look
items.summary: OpenAI’s books show zero debt and just $46mn of quarterly capital spending. The catch, reported by The Information: around $665bn of commitments sitting just off the balance sheet, now heading for regulators’ desks. On paper, OpenAI looks like a lean software…
items.titleZh: OpenAI可疑的干净资产负债表即将受到严厉审查
items.summaryZh: OpenAI的账目显示，债务为零，季度资本支出仅为4600万美元。据《信息报》报道，问题在于：资产负债表外约有6650亿美元的承诺，现在正流向监管机构的办公桌。从纸面上看，OpenAI看起来像一个精益软件…

items.title: ‘We poisoned our community’: New Mexico DEA agents watched fentanyl hit the streets and did nothing to stop it reaching people
items.summary: “We poisoned our community to make cases,” DEA Special Agent David Howell said in a series of interviews in New Mexico. “Through our own willful blindness, we get to say, ‘We don’t really know what happened to the drugs.’ But we 100% got people killed.”
items.titleZh: “我们毒害了我们的社区”：新墨西哥州缉毒局特工看着芬太尼走上街头，却没有采取任何措施阻止它接触到人们
items.summaryZh: 缉毒局特工大卫·豪厄尔在新墨西哥州接受一系列采访时说：“我们毒害了我们的社区，制造了案件。”。“由于我们自己故意视而不见，我们可以说，‘我们真的不知道药物发生了什么。’但我们100%地让人死亡。”

items.title: Lucid lays off 18% of staff, its second deep cut in four months
items.summary:
Lucid Motors is laying off 18% of its workforce, roughly 1,500 employees, just four months after the EV maker cut 12% of its staff. The company also confirmed Monday that it has eliminated the second production shift at its Casa Grande, Arizona factory.
It’s …
items.titleZh: Lucid裁员18%，四个月来第二次大幅裁员
items.summaryZh: 就在电动汽车制造商Lucid Motors裁员12%的四个月后，该公司正在裁员18%，约1500名员工。该公司周一还证实，它已经取消了亚利桑那州卡萨格兰德工厂的第二个生产班次。

items.title: SpaceX taps the bond market for the first time to fund AI
items.summary: Fresh from a record IPO that helped make Elon Musk a trillionaire, SpaceX is raising at least $20bn in its debut bond sale to bankroll a vast AI build-out. SpaceX is about to do something none of Elon Musk’s companies has done before. It is borrowing money fr…
items.titleZh: SpaceX首次利用债券市场为人工智能提供资金
items.summaryZh: 在帮助埃隆·马斯克成为亿万富翁的创纪录IPO之后，SpaceX首次发行债券筹集了至少200亿美元，为大规模的人工智能建设提供资金。SpaceX即将做一件埃隆·马斯克的公司以前从未做过的事情。它正在借钱给…

items.title: Germany tells Trump: you cannot get to the moon without us
items.summary: Germany’s space minister has a message for Washington: the dependence runs both ways. In an interview with Politico at the VivaTech trade show in Paris this week, Dorothee Bär said Europe provides “critical key technologies” for American space missions, addin…
items.titleZh: 德国告诉特朗普：没有我们，你就无法登上月球
items.summaryZh: 德国航天部长向华盛顿传达了一个信息：这种依赖是双向的。在本周于巴黎举行的VivaTech贸易展上接受Politico采访时，Dorothee Bär表示，欧洲为美国太空任务提供了“关键关键技术”，此外…

items.title: The autonomous business is coming. Here's why that shift is good news for professionals
items.summary: Companies are investing in AI agents and cutting staff, but talented professionals will find new opportunities.
items.titleZh: 自主创业即将到来。这就是为什么这种转变对专业人士来说是个好消息
items.summaryZh: 公司正在投资人工智能代理并裁员，但有才华的专业人士将找到新的机会。

items.title: Delivery robot startup Robot.com is betting its next act on workplace humanoids
items.summary: Robot.com is expanding beyond campus-delivery bots with a new wheeled-humanoid that the company said can be deployed across several industries.
items.titleZh: 送货机器人初创公司robot.com将其下一步行动押注于工作场所的类人机器人
items.summaryZh: Robot.com正在用一种新的轮式人形机器人扩展到校园送货机器人之外，该公司表示，这种机器人可以部署在多个行业。

items.title: Patreon CEO Jack Conte on supporting artists in the AI slop era
items.summary: Today, I’m talking with Jack Conte, the CEO of Patreon. Jack last joined me on the show almost exactly five years ago, in the summer of 2021, and a lot has changed on the internet and in the creator landscape since then, so I was very excited to talk to him a…
items.titleZh: Patreon首席执行官Jack Conte谈在AI垃圾时代支持艺术家
items.summaryZh: 今天，我与Patreon的首席执行官Jack Conte进行了交谈。杰克最后一次和我一起参加这个节目是在大约五年前的2021年夏天，从那以后，互联网和创作者的格局发生了很大变化，所以我很高兴能和他谈谈…

items.title: Gensler put AI in the design room. Now it's helping shape thousands of projects.
items.summary: Gensler's team tested a range of vendor-created generative AI tools, some of which are now integrated within an in-house interface.
items.titleZh: Gensler把AI放在了设计室里。现在，它正在帮助塑造数千个项目。
items.summaryZh: Gensler的团队测试了一系列供应商创建的生成人工智能工具，其中一些现在集成在内部界面中。

items.title: Intel and AMD unveil new x86 standard to make CPUs better at running AI models
items.summary: The specification, called Advanced Compute Extensions, or ACE, lays out a way to handle AI operations more efficiently on x86 processors. It is not aimed at replacing GPUs in large-scale training environments. Instead, the focus is on smaller models, latency-…
items.titleZh: 英特尔和AMD推出新的x86标准，使CPU更好地运行AI模型
items.summaryZh: 该规范名为高级计算扩展（ACE），它提供了一种在x86处理器上更有效地处理AI操作的方法。它的目的不是在大规模训练环境中取代GPU。相反，重点是更小的模型、延迟…
